title: Language
documentation:
## Purpose
Identifies the natural language in which a machine should produce or expect content. Uses two-letter language codes drawn from the allowed set.

## When to use
Attach this parameter to translation, summarization, or generation machines that must target a specific language. If the desired language is not in the allowed set, check [Language Code](https://capdag.com/browse/media:language-code;textable) for an equivalent entry.

## Notes
Allowed values: `en`, `es`, `fr`, `de`, `it`, `pt`, `ru`, `zh`, `ja`, `ko`. This type and [Language Code](https://capdag.com/browse/media:language-code;textable) share the same validation set; prefer `language` for human-readable configuration and `language-code` when the intent is explicitly a BCP 47-style tag.
